name: spawn_agent
description: Spawn a sub-agent from the available agents directory to work on a delegated task. Always non-blocking: returns a handle immediately while the sub-agent runs in parallel; its result arrives later as a message, and you can cancel it with task_kill (pass the handle). Sub-agents run under your permission rules and share your token budget.

agent.description: Name of the sub-agent to spawn (must be listed in the agents directory).

task.description: The task for the sub-agent to perform.

inputs.description: Artifacts to place into the sub-agent's workspace before it starts.
